about_h1_1: Who we are and what drives us
about_h3_8: Our story in the journey to make industrial storage more efficient, safe and accessible
about_p_21: Displayed Storage and Display Solutions was established in 1995 with a clear vision - to provide advanced industrial storage solutions that change the way businesses manage their resources. We believe that a good storage system is not just shelves - it's infrastructure that enables businesses to grow, become more efficient and succeed.
about_p_22: For many years, we have specialized in providing industrial storage shelf solutions for factories and businesses of all sizes. The experience we have gained and the expertise we have developed allow us to deeply understand the unique challenges of each industry and provide customized solutions that meet the precise needs of our customers.
about_p_23: We are proud to have become trusted partners to hundreds of businesses and factories throughout the country. Every project we undertake is a new opportunity to learn, develop and improve our service. Our commitment to quality, safety and excellent customer service is what drives us forward every day.
about_p_24: We use only the highest quality raw materials and work according to strict manufacturing standards. Every product undergoes rigorous quality checks before reaching the customer. Our industrial storage shelves for factories are built to last for many years.
about_p_25: Worker and equipment safety is at the top of our priorities. Every storage solution we provide meets international safety standards and undergoes comprehensive stability and load testing. We also provide professional safety training for our customers' teams.
about_p_26: We invest in continuous research and development to stay at the forefront of technology and innovation in the field of industrial storage. Our heavy-duty storage solutions and compactus facilities for businesses incorporate advanced technologies to improve efficiency and convenience.
about_p_27: We see every customer as a long-term partner. Our commitment doesn't end with installation - we provide ongoing support, routine maintenance and full availability for any question or problem. Customer satisfaction is our measure of success.
about_p_28: Our team consists of engineers, planners and skilled installation teams with extensive experience in the field. We invest in continuous training of our employees to ensure they are updated with the most advanced technologies and working methods.
about_p_29: We are committed to acting responsibly towards the environment. Our products are manufactured from sustainable materials, and all our manufacturing processes are carried out while maintaining reduced emissions and minimal environmental impact.
about_p_30: With many years of experience in the field of industrial storage, we bring to the table deep and extensive expertise in all aspects of planning, manufacturing and installation of storage systems. Our team includes certified engineers, experienced planners and skilled installation technicians who have undergone professional training.
about_p_31: We specialize in a wide range of solutions: industrial storage shelves for factories with exceptionally heavy loads, compactus facilities for businesses looking to maximize existing space, industrial furniture for logistics companies that requires workflow optimization. Each project is carefully planned by our experts using advanced three-dimensional planning software.
about_p_32: Our expertise spans across various industries: manufacturing plants, logistics companies, distribution warehouses, archives, libraries, laboratories and more. We understand the unique needs of each industry and are able to provide customized solutions that meet the specific challenges of each customer.
about_p_33: We begin with an in-depth meeting to understand your needs, challenges and goals. We will conduct a comprehensive survey of the facility and collect all the information needed to plan the perfect solution.
about_p_34: Our professional team plans the customized solution using advanced three-dimensional software. We will present the detailed plan to you and make adjustments as needed.
about_p_35: Products are manufactured in our factory while maintaining strict quality standards. Each component undergoes rigorous quality checks before delivery.
about_p_36: Our skilled installation team performs quick and accurate installation with minimal disruption to ongoing operations. We take care of every detail and ensure compliance with safety standards.
about_p_37: After installation, we provide comprehensive training to your team on proper and safe use of the system. Our support continues over time with maintenance and technical support services.
about_p_38: We understand that choosing an industrial storage solutions provider is a significant decision for your business. Therefore, we are committed to providing not only quality products, but also professional service, personal attention and ongoing support.
about_p_39: Every project we undertake is handled with the same level of professionalism and attention, whether it's a small system for a small business or a large project for an industrial plant. We believe every customer deserves the best, and we do everything to ensure that's what they get.
about_p_40: Your business success is our success. We strive to build long-term relationships with our customers and be your trusted partner for all industrial storage needs. Whether you're looking for industrial storage shelving for factories, heavy-duty storage solutions, compactus installations for businesses, or industrial furniture for logistics companies - we're here for you.
about_p_41: Ready to start working with us? Our team of experts is waiting to hear from you and help you find the perfect solution for your needs.

services_h1_1: Industrial Storage Solutions Tailored to Every Need
services_p_12: We specialize in industrial storage shelving for factories designed to withstand harsh working conditions and exceptionally heavy loads. Our systems are built from high-quality steel with anti-corrosion coating and are adapted to challenging industrial environments.
services_p_13: Every shelving system undergoes rigorous quality testing and is designed by experienced engineers according to the specific needs of your factory. We offer a wide range of heights, widths, and load capacities, starting from 500 kg up to 5 tons per shelf.
services_p_14: Our heavy-duty storage solutions are designed for businesses that store industrial equipment, heavy raw materials, or large products. We provide strong and stable storage systems that ensure maximum safety and exceptional load-bearing capacity.
services_p_15: The systems include special reinforcement rails, reinforced bases, and safety locking mechanisms. Each solution is carefully designed taking into account the equipment weight, access frequency, and the business's logistical needs.
services_p_16: Our business compactus systems offer a smart and space-saving storage solution. Our mobile systems allow savings of up to 50% in storage space, while maintaining full accessibility to all stored items.
services_p_17: The compactus is particularly suitable for archives, equipment warehouses, libraries, laboratories, and logistics centers. The system includes a smooth and quiet sliding mechanism, automatic locking system, and the option to integrate a computerized inventory management system.
services_p_18:
Our industrial furniture for logistics companies includes a wide range of storage and display solutions adapted to the special needs of the logistics industry.

Mutzagim company offers a wide and rich variety of industrial furniture and storage containers made of plastic and metal. The company combines local manufacturing with imports from the best manufacturers in the world, these companies offer quality and professional storage solutions, such as workstations, multi-compartment carts, various types of cabinets, shelving systems and drawer sets, alongside plastic, metal and anti-static storage products.


The product range is available in various configurations, colors and sizes, with customization options such as opening or sliding doors, locking mechanisms and multiple internal divisions. This allows us to plan for each customer an integrated industrial furniture system - including shelves, cabinets, drawers and more - precisely adapted to their needs.
services_p_19: The systems are designed to work in harmony with forklifts, automation systems, and other logistics equipment. We specialize in creating optimal workflow that increases efficiency and shortens collection and distribution times.
services_p_20: Every project begins with a comprehensive survey of your facility and in-depth analysis of the unique needs and challenges. Our team of engineers and planners works with you step by step to create the perfect storage solution.
services_p_21: We consider every relevant parameter: ceiling height, aisle width, type of stored equipment, access frequency, safety requirements, and budget. The result is an efficient, safe storage system precisely adapted to your needs.
services_p_22: Our professional installation team consists of skilled and certified technicians with many years of experience. We perform fast and accurate installation with minimal disruption to the business's ongoing operations.
services_p_23: After installation, we provide comprehensive training to your team on proper and safe use of the system. Our service doesn't end with installation - we offer ongoing maintenance, technical support, and future upgrade services.
services_p_24: Quality and safety are our top priorities. Every product undergoes rigorous quality testing at every stage of production and installation. We work according to strict international safety standards and ensure compliance with all relevant regulations.
services_p_25: Our systems undergo load testing, stability testing, and comprehensive safety testing before delivery. We provide complete documentation of all tests and appropriate safety certificates. Additionally, we offer periodic inspection services to ensure the systems continue to meet safety standards over time.
services_p_26: Our team of experts is ready to help you find the perfect solution for your needs. Contact us today for professional consultation and a price quote.

vlm_vertical_storage_h1_1: Vertical Storage Solutions - VLM (Vertical Lift Module)
vlm_vertical_storage_h2_4: Ready to Upgrade Your Storage System?
vlm_vertical_storage_p_11:
The Automated Revolution in Your Warehouse: Maximum Storage in Minimum Floor Space
The VLM system is a vertical automated warehouse based on a smart internal elevator. The system stores trays in a tall, enclosed structure and retrieves them for the operator at the push of a button. This method brings goods to the person (Goods-to-Person), saving valuable walking time and preventing picking errors.
vlm_vertical_storage_p_12:
Maximum Space Utilization: Utilizing building height up to the ceiling allows savings of up to 90% of floor space compared to conventional shelving.
Inventory Management Accuracy: Software interface (WMS) that manages every item at the tray and exact location level.
Ergonomics and Safety: The operator receives goods at the ideal working height, without the need to climb ladders or bend down.
Product Protection: Goods are stored within an enclosed structure that protects them from dust, damage, and unauthorized access.
Picking Speed: Dramatic improvement in work pace thanks to eliminating search and walking time in the warehouse.
vlm_vertical_storage_p_13:
The system is customized to customer needs and warehouse structure:
System height - from 3 meters up to 15 meters (depending on ceiling height).
Tray load capacity - options for trays carrying from 250 kg up to 1,000 kg per single tray.
Tray width - variety of sizes (for example from 1.9 meters up to 4 meters).
Dynamic height management - the system measures the height of items on the tray and positions it with the minimum possible clearance for optimal volume utilization.
Work openings - multiple work openings (picking windows) can be integrated on different floors or on both sides of the machine.
vlm_vertical_storage_p_14:
The system is suitable for any business managing inventory of small to medium parts:
* Automotive industry: spare parts storage.
* Pharma and medical equipment: managing sensitive items and expiration dates.
* Electronics: small components requiring protection and clean environment.
* Maintenance (MRO): storage of work tools and technical equipment for factories.
* E-commerce: fast picking of multi-item orders.
vlm_vertical_storage_p_15:
1.   Laser pointer / Point-to-Light: light beam that shows the operator exactly which item to take from the tray.
2. Extractable trays: option for full extraction of the tray outside the machine for convenient loading using a forklift.
3. Weighing system: prevents overloading of trays and controls inventory by weight.
4. Temperature control: dedicated solutions for refrigerated or controlled environment storage.
vlm_vertical_storage_p_17: Our experts will customize the perfect vertical storage system for your building dimensions and business logistics needs.
